title: OREGON PRENATAL TO KINDERGARTEN - 211info
text: MID-COLUMBIA CHILDREN'S COUNCIL INC OREGON PRENATAL TO KINDERGARTEN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Fosters school readiness in an inclusive classroom setting by supporting the cognitive, social, emotional, and physical development of children. Supports families and children with health services, home visits, family engagement, and parent leadership skills. 1100 E Marina Drive Suite 215 Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Pregnant parents or children ages 0-5. Families income must be equal to or below 100% of the federal poverty level (FPL) or is categorically eligible. Categorical eligibility includes SNAP, TANF, foster families, and families experiencing homelessness. Families experiencing domestic violence, parental incarceration, substance use disorder, or child welfare involvement may also qualify based on demonstrated need. Hours: Varies Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: School Year: August-June Monday-Friday 8am-2pm Services: Preschools School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
